description: Poll Qlik Enterprise Manager for per-task metrics (state, latency, throughput, error count) and emit a DataFrame asset. One row per task per materialization. Foundation for CDC observability dashboards and alert-input assets.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key for the emitted DataFrame.

servers.label: Servers
servers.description: Enterprise Manager server names to poll.

tasks.label: Tasks
tasks.description: Optional whitelist of task names. Leave unset to include every task on every server.
